description: Lead does not yet own the property. Purchasing specifically for STR purposes, or considering STR as the use case before completing. Longest pipeline. High intent if purchase completes.
key_drivers: wants to make sure STR is viable before completing purchase
key_objections: STR income projections uncertain before seeing property
what_resonates: income projections showing STR as viable mortgage offset strategy
specific comparable properties in target area
guidance on what makes a good STR property
Stayful can advise on property choice before purchase completes
pitch_angle: You are buying specifically for income. Stayful can tell you whether this specific property is a good STR and what income to expect — before you complete. We can advise on which properties in your target area perform best.
critical_checks: Check lease or freehold — many new builds prohibit STR
Verify mortgage type allows STR use
Confirm no planning restrictions on short-term letting
